top_signals.title: China Evergrande liquidators warn PwC partners not to use divorce to shield assets
top_signals.summary: Letter to auditors of failed property group comes after reports of some taking steps to avoid potential damage payouts
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SuperCritical lands US Gov’t licence for seawater uranium
top_signals.summary: Exclusive DOE technology gives startup a path toward commercial uranium recovery as US nuclear fuel demand builds.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SonicWall warns of SMA1000 flaws exploited in zero-day attacks, patch now
top_signals.summary: SonicWall warns that threat actors have been exploiting two SMA1000 vulnerabilities, tracked as CVE-2026-15409 and CVE-2026-15410, in zero-day attacks and urges customers to install the newly released security updates. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: EU leaders eye social media ban for children under age 13
top_signals.summary: “While ultimately it is up to parents to decide when children get their first smartphones, what we already have is a consensus that there needs to be a start date for the age children can join social media,” says European Commission President Ursula van der Leyen.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Alsym Energy, ERITY sign 9 GWh sodium-ion battery deal for mining sector
top_signals.summary: Companies say deal is the largest known sodium-ion battery agreement to date in the global mining industry.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Almonty Industries, Global Tungsten expand offtake agreement
top_signals.summary: Extends tungsten concentrate produced from Sangdong mine in South Korea by six years.
